title: Term of permit; renewal
doc_html:
§715.  Term of permit; renewal

This permit shall extend for one year from the date of its issue, unless sooner revoked as provided in this Part and shall be renewed annually thereafter.
doc_text:
§715.  Term of permit; renewal
This permit shall extend for one year from the date of its issue, unless sooner revoked as provided in this Part and shall be renewed annually thereafter.
